title: Basic JavaScript Internationalization
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Internationalization. Focus on implementing Intl.DateTimeFormat correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Internationalization
description: Create a function that uses Intl.DateTimeFormat and Intl.NumberFormat together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Internationalization Project
description: Build a small application that applies Intl.DateTimeFormat, Intl.NumberFormat, Intl.Collator for sorting in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Internationalization
description: The following code has bugs related to Intl.DateTimeFormat. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Internationalization
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Intl.DateTimeFormat and Intl.NumberFormat.
